derived.causal_summary: Ran a verify-first batch fix closing the round-3 tail of the scouted bugfix train: 4 originally-unconfirmed targets re-confirmed by a gpt-5.5-fast confirm pass; 1 (cli-devin phantom dangerous permission rows) already shipped via parallel 130/014, so this packet lands the remaining 3 with regression tests. Fixes: D4-R grader system prompt emitting dim_id D4R (no hyphen) while the harness strict-equals D4-R, silently capping confidence at 0.3 and injecting a mismatch annotation on every real grade (mock path injects caller dimId so invisible in tests) -> prompt changed to D4-R; handover freshness in resume-ladder parseHandoverSignal only trying last_updated/last_updated_at top-level so updated: top-level and last_updated_at under _memory.continuity fell through to mtime (single frontmatter extraction + updated alias + continuity-block fallback; 11/11 tests); updatePhaseParentPointer in generate-context (highest-frequency graph-metadata mutation) reading via JSON.parse and writing via atomicWriteJson with no validation, accepting malformed timestamps/empty last_active_child_id (parse with graphMetadataSchema Zod before mutating; typed GraphMetadata value; tests pass via tsx as vitest segfaults on Node v25). All 3 regression tests pass; affected TS typechecks clean.
